prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document is specifically focused on healthcare procedures, screenings, and support related to Patau's syndrome in the UK. It does not mention or apply to Scotland, as healthcare processes and guidelines can vary significantly between Scotland and the rest of the UK. Therefore, specific reference to Scotland is not included.
